general_advisory: Carry out land preparation for sowing of kharif crops. Prepare the field and arrange good quality seeds. Provide irrigation to fruit orchards and sugarcane crop.

advisory: Pre-sowing Varietal- Upland rice varieties like SahabhagiDhan, DRR Naveen, GB SwarnaShreya etc. can be cultivated.
Pre-Sowing: For one acre of maize cultivation 6-7 kg of seeds is required.
Pre-sowing: For Arhar cultivation, the row to row and plant to plant spacing should be 60 cm and 20 cm respectively.
Pre-sowing: In Kharif season June 15 - July 15 is the best time for Sunflower sowing purpose.
Pre-sowing: Mid-June to mid-July is the best time for sowing purpose of sesame in Kharif season.
Keep cattle in the shed and provide clean and sufficient water. Do bathing twice a day and ensure good ventilation.
Supply plenty of clean and cold water to poultry birds. Add salts to increase water consumption. Add extra vitamins and minerals to compensate for reduced feed consumption.
Stock Carp such as Rohu, Catla, and Mrigal in a certain ratio to increase benefits. Maintain pond quality with proper application of nutrients.
